channel.title: Naive Bayes Classifier on Øystein Sørensen
channel.description: Recent content in Naive Bayes Classifier on Øystein Sørensen

item.title: From observed laterality to latent hemispheric differences: Revisiting the inference problem
item.description: This paper considers predicting whether people are right or left brain dominant for language processing, based on their result in dichotic listening experiments as well as their handedness. Published in Laterality
